user_system_path: Graceful degradation / never go dark (#538): when all Tier-1 discrepancy candidates are exhausted, tier-descent safety net fires. Tier 2: commitment due ≤14d → write_document. Tier 3: thread-backed owed reply → send_message. do_nothing only when both tiers genuinely empty. 1014 tests green. PR pending.
allowed_files_raw: Allow-by-default-minus-forbidden (friction reduction, owner-directed 2026-06-22). The contract no longer pins a narrow per-seam whitelist that blocks owner-authorized fixes outside the active seam. The real guard is forbidden_file_patterns + the proof doctrine, not a whitelist. Small owner-directed hotfixes (e.g. the Microsoft guest #EXT# email self-heal in lib/sync + lib/ui shipped on this branch) no longer require displacing the active seam.
forbidden_files_raw: HARD RAILS (unchanged by the allow-by-default switch): No Stripe, Scout, schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. No BLIND loosening of positive_winner_contract or the discrepancy-card quality gate (the #452 'hollow drafts' mistake) — every gate change carries a test + before/after read.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck; npx vitest run lib/briefing lib/workday-presence (1014 tests green)
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): after next morning-pipeline cron, pipeline_runs.gate_funnel.tier_descent_winner is non-null for 2cbc1bab on a day with no Tier-1 discrepancy; directive is finished-work shape (not do_nothing).
browser_proof_command: manual: wait for morning-pipeline cron; query pipeline_runs for 2cbc1bab; check gate_funnel.tier_descent_winner.
acceptance_condition: gate:continuity green + 1014 tests green + PR merged + live cron tier_descent_winner non-null for 2cbc1bab.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
tier-descent only fires in no_valid_action branch — BAD1-5 in usefulness-gate still pass
tier-descent Tier 2 excludes past-due commitments (gte today filter)
tier-descent Tier 3 uses isThreadBackedSendableLoop — no fabricated or stale signal candidates
stop_condition: PR merged for claude/pr-merge-sequence-kziba2; next morning-pipeline cron shows tier_descent_winner non-null for 2cbc1bab on a no-Tier-1 day.
next_command: Next session: read #538. After deploy check pipeline_runs.gate_funnel.tier_descent_winner for 2cbc1bab. Standing: #537 Fix B/C; Scout #494; OneDrive #507.
